headline: Small SE junk under all-day onshore — one to skip.
today: Nothing but leftover windswell knee-to-waist and the SSE stays onshore dawn to dark, building to 23mph by evening. No clean window today, it's textured and closing out. Save your energy for later in the week.

daysToWatch.note: Real size shows up, 3.5-4.5ft, but it's S at a marginal angle so expect closeouts. SW cross-on softens midmorning if you want to poke at it.
Best window of the week here. Waist-to-chest at 6s with NNE cross-off in the morning — dawn patrol on a shortboard or fish before the SE fills in afternoon.
Glassy dawn with light wind and clean 2ft SE. Log or groveler session before the afternoon onshore turns it on.
